arts.ttl: Aston Villa Stance Leads Al-Nassr to Explore Alternative to £80M-Rated PSG, West Ham Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly interested in Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán as they aim to bolster their attack with a long-term perspective. According to journalist Ben Jacobs, PSG remain keen on the Colombian forward but face a stumbling block in Aston Villa’s £80 million valuation. arts.ttl: Aston Villa Edge Newcastle, Wolves in Pursuit of €25M-Rated PSG Outcast
arts.sum: With the January transfer window open, Paris Saint-Germain has the chance to move on from players who no longer fit into their plans, and Marco Asensio seems to be one of them. Since November 30, Asensio’s role has significantly diminished.
